attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY               ,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE              ,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE       ,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                ,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(SUM(SERVC.DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT)  AS DECIMAL(28,16)) AS DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT,
SERVC.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
/*CASE WHEN NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ='Software' AND (NP.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD ='Software' OR (NP.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD='Hardware' AND NP.INCLUDES_SOFTWARE_FLG='Y'))
          AND SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
     THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG */
'Y' AS RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG,
CAST(SUM(SERVC.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
CAST(SUM(SERVC.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE )  AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(SERVC.DD_EXTENDED_QTY,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(SERVC.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(SERVC.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))   AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY,
CAST(SUM(COALESCE(SERVC.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) * SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RS_CTRL_MTH CTRL
ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CTRL.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'N'
AND CTRL.PROCESS_FLAG = 'Y'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SERVICES_BOOKINGS SERVC 
ON SERVC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND SERVC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND SERVC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
AND SERVC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SERVC.SALES_REP_NUMBER = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC SFH
ON SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
AND SFH.DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD='SPA'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN NPDT
ON NPDT.PRODUCT_KEY = SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
AND NPDT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT = BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS', 'UNKNOWN')

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP
ON (CASE WHEN SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -998
WHEN  SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999
ELSE SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY END) = NP.ITEM_KEY
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RS_PRODUCTS_SERVICES EL
ON EL.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY

WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'
AND ( TRIM(BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE) NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' OR  TRIM(BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE) IN ('LCLD-PVT') )
AND NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD ='Software'
AND (NP.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD ='Software' OR (NP.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_CD='Hardware' AND NP.INCLUDES_SOFTWARE_FLG='Y'))
AND SFH.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID NOT IN ('UNKNOWN','CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES','TRAINING' )
AND EL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'

GROUP BY BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   ,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE           ,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE    ,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY             ,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER                ,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
SERVC.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT  ,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  ,
SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY              ,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG             ,
SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME

SELECT
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY               ,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE              ,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE       ,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                ,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(SUM(SERVC.DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT) AS DECIMAL(28,16)) AS DV_PID_ALLOC_PCT,
SERVC.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
'N' AS RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG,
0 AS  RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
0 AS  RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
0 AS  RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
0 AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
0 AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY,
0 AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RS_CTRL_MTH CTRL
ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CTRL.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'N'
AND CTRL.PROCESS_FLAG = 'Y'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SERVICES_BOOKINGS SERVC 
ON SERVC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND SERVC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND SERVC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
AND SERVC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SERVC.SALES_REP_NUMBER = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RS_PRODUCTS_SERVICES EL
ON EL.ITEM_KEY = (CASE WHEN SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -998
WHEN  SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999
ELSE SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY END)

WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'
AND   EL.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_RS_SERVICES_RETRO SRVC
WHERE SRVC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND   SRVC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND   SRVC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND   SRVC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND   SRVC.SALES_REP_NUMBER = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND   SRVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
AND   SRVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY  = SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY)

GROUP BY BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY      ,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE              ,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE       ,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                ,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER                   ,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      ,
SERVC.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT     ,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT     ,
SERVC.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY                 ,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG                ,
SERVC.SERVICE_ITEM_KEY
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
